title: AI Mediator
subtitle: Neutral conflict analysis
no_couple_desc: The mediator works for couples only
how_it_works_desc: Each partner describes the situation independently. The AI sees both sides and provides a neutral, non-judgmental analysis.
empty_desc: Start your first mediation session to resolve a conflict together
new_session_subtitle: AI will build a neutral analysis
conflict_topic_hint: Briefly describe — what is the disagreement about?
privacy_shield: Your partner won't see your words — only the AI analysis of both perspectives
form_describe_placeholder: What happened? Describe in your own words...
form_outcome_label: What do you want as an outcome?
analyzing_desc: This will take about a minute
waiting_partner_desc: Waiting for your partner's description. Once both submit, AI will generate the analysis.
analysis_neutral: A neutral view of the situation. No one is at fault — each person has their own truth.
